title: Ordering Extra Food 要求加餐
scene: Mike和Jack在餐厅吃到一半想加菜。

lines.en: A little bit. The food is so good!
Do you want to order some more?
Can we get another plate of dumplings?
lines.zh: 我们可以再要一盘饺子吗？

lines.en: Sure. I also want to try the fried rice.
And maybe some more juice? I am thirsty.
lines.zh: 也许再要些果汁？我渴了。

lines.en: Let me call the waiter. Excuse me!
We would like to order some more food, please.
One plate of dumplings, one fried rice, and two juices.
lines.zh: 一盘饺子，一份炒饭，两杯果汁。

lines.en: Thank you! We are so hungry today!
